items.title: Retirement: Migrate from Azure Blueprints by January 31, 2027
items.summary: In September 2023, we announced Azure Blueprints would retire on July 11, 2026. We're extending that timeline to January 31, 2027, with phased retirement beginning July 31, 2026.What's changing?July 31, 2026, you won't be able to create new blueprint defi

items.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Application Gateway for Containers – Inference gateway
items.summary: Application Gateway for Containers is extending its ingress gateway feature set with new AI gateway capabilities. The new inference gateway capability brings the Kubernetes Gateway API Inference Extension to Application Gateway for Containers, enabling lo

items.title: [In preview] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files migration assistant
items.summary: Azure NetApp Files migration assistant (with SnapMirror) provides efficient and cost-effective data migration leveraging ONTAP's built-in replication engine for seamless transition from on-premises or CVO/other cloud providers to Azure NetApp Files (ANF).

items.title: Retirement: Azure VMware Solution AV36 Node Retirement now on September 30, 2027
items.summary: Microsoft announced the retirement of the AV36 node type on June 30, 2028, that date has changed to align with VMware’s roadmap. Broadcom will end support for the current AV36 version with vSphere 8 on September 30, 2027, and the AV36 SKU is not compatibl

items.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Migrate – GitHub Copilot Modernization integration for at scale code assessments
items.summary:
Azure Migrate now integrates with GitHub Copilot
Modernization (public preview) to deliver at scale code insights. This capability brings
together Azure Migrate’s portfolio-level discovery and assessment with GitHub
Copilot’s context-aware code analysis.

items.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Databricks native read access to Microsoft OneLake
items.summary: Azure Databricks now supports native read access to data stored in Microsoft OneLake through Unity Catalog. This capability is generally available. Customers can query and analyze data directly in OneLake without moving or copying data, enabling faster ac

items.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Databricks natively storing data in Microsoft OneLake
items.summary: Azure Databricks can now natively write managed Delta tables to Microsoft OneLake. This capability enables customers to use OneLake as a unified storage layer for Azure Databricks workloads without managing separate storage accounts. By storing data direc

items.title: [Launched] Generally Available: ICMP Support for Azure Standard V2 NAT Gateway
items.summary:
Azure
StandardV2 NAT Gateway now supports outbound ICMP Echo Request and Echo Reply

outbound connectivity and troubleshoot network issues from workloads behind

items.title: [In preview] Public Preview: New project templates and template gallery for Azure Functions in VS Code

items.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Log Analytics Summary Rules experience
items.summary: A new Azure portal experience for Summary Rules in Log Analytics is now available. Summary Rules enable aggregation of high-volume log data at a defined cadence and store it in summarized tables for improved query performance, reporting, or enhanced data

items.summary:

items.title: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL MCP Server
items.summary:

a secure, high-performance way to build agentic solutions with controlled
access to production data. Built for SQL and compatible with PostgreSQL and

items.summary:

items.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Entra server principals on Azure SQL Database
items.summary: Microsoft Entra server principals (logins) for Azure SQL Database is now generally available. You can now use CREATE LOGIN ... FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER in the virtual master database, bringing parity with SQL logins for your Microsoft Entra identities.With

items.title: Retirement: Azure Synapse Link for Azure Cosmos DB NoSQL

items.title: [Launched] Generally Available: PostgreSQL Hub for Azure Developers
